title: Pursuit Spirits Rye Chosen for 2026 Whiskey Row Series
summary: Pursuit Spirits' rare Double Oak Rye with a custom Tobacco toasted stave profile is the 2026 Whiskey Row Series pick. Just 160 bottles at 108 proof, priced at $69.99.

title: Filliers Family Reserve 34YO is Belgium’s oldest whisky
summary: Belgian distillery Filliers has released its oldest expression to date: a 34-year-old single grain whisky.

title: So Good Soju Launches in India via Penguin Overseas
summary: Penguin Overseas launches So Good Soju in India with still and sparkling variants. Available in Maharashtra and Haryana, the brand targets India's growing low-ABV market.

title: GlenAllachie 11 Year Old Palo Cortado Sherry Series Release
summary: GlenAllachie unveils its 11-year-old Palo Cortado cask-matured Scotch whisky, the fourth expression in its Sherry Series. Bottled at 48% ABV, natural color, non-chill filtered.

title: Rare Van Winkle Bourbon Auction Live on Unicorn Platform
summary: Unicorn's landmark bourbon auction features ultra-rare Van Winkle private barrel picks from Chicago's history, including the legendary Binny's 18. Bidding runs through April 26.

title: Woven Whisky Expands Into France, Italy, Spain & New Zealand
summary: Edinburgh's Woven Whisky announces four new international distribution partnerships across France, Italy, Spain and New Zealand, targeting flavor-driven drinkers.

title: Four Pillars launches Three Peach Gin
summary: Australian distillery Four Pillars has launched a limited edition Three Peach Gin, which is designed to stand out in cocktails.

title: Master of Malt Release Soccer Themed Whisky Collection
summary: Master of Malt launches a five-bottle limited edition whisky collection with labels inspired by iconic Italia '90 and France '98 football kits, featuring rare Ben Nevis 27 Year Old.

title: Loch Lomond Unveils 2026 Open Championship Whiskies
summary: Loch Lomond releases two limited-edition single malts for The 154th Open at Royal Birkdale: a 19-year-old Port-finished Collection and a Malbec-finished Special Edition.

title: Falkirk Distillery Stars in Brian Cox’s Film Glenrothan
summary: Falkirk Distillery features prominently in Glenrothan, Brian Cox's new film celebrating Scotland's whisky heritage. Explore the real locations behind the fiction.

title: Lancaster Spirits Co. Names Craig Drake as Distillery Manager
summary: Lancaster Spirits Co. appoints Craig Drake as distillery manager, bringing Adnams expertise as the Lancashire distillery prepares to launch its first single malt whisky in 2027.

title: Balvenie x Victo Ngai: Limited-Edition Father’s Day Gift Pack
summary: The Balvenie partners with artist Victo Ngai for a limited-edition Father's Day gift pack featuring DoubleWood 12, a Caribbean Cask 14 sample, and leather coasters.

title: Angel’s Envy 2026: First 10-Year Rye & Cask Strength Bourbon
summary: Angel's Envy unveils its 2026 dual release: a first-ever 10-year age-stated Cask Strength Rye and annual Cask Strength Bourbon finished in port barrels, launching April 17.

title: Hoochenanny Festival 2026: Tickets, Lineup & Whiskey Tasting
summary: Hoochenanny Festival returns Aug. 14-16, 2026, with My Morning Jacket, Modest Mouse, and 30+ distilleries. Get presale tickets now at Iron Smoke Distillery.

title: Armorik Chouchenn whisky given permanent spot
summary: French whisky brand Armorik has upgraded one of its limited edition expressions to its permanent portfolio.

title: Tanglin creates gin for Great Eastern
summary: Singapore's Tanglin Gin Distillery has created a custom gin for insurance company Great Eastern to mark its partnership with OCBC Group.

title: Stewart Laing, Scotch Whisky Scion Who Founded Hunter Laing and Later Opened Ardnahoe Distillery, Dies at 79
summary: Stewart Laing, founder of Ardnahoe Distillery and co-founder of Hunter Laing & Co., has died at the age of 79. He was a pioneer in the single cask scotch sector.

title: Angostura rum receives brand refresh
summary: House of Angostura has given its rum portfolio a redesign and incorporated more sustainable packaging across the range.
